# Stela llms.txt
# HEAD: d16759de8
# HEAD commit time: 2026-02-28T14:19:13-05:00
# Refresh: ./ops/bin/llms
# One Truth bundle index.

## 0. Root Bundles
- llms-core.txt - Layer 0 (CORE) synthesis output.
- llms-full.txt - Layer 2 (DISCOVERY) synthesis output.
- llms.txt - This pointer index.

## 1. Manifest Hierarchy
- ops/src/manifests/*.md.tpl - Manifest template source of truth.
- ops/lib/manifests/CORE.md - Immutable Physical Laws manifest.
- ops/lib/manifests/OPS.md - Session operations manifest (inherits CORE).
- ops/lib/manifests/DISCOVERY.md - Discovery manifest (inherits CORE).
- ops/lib/manifests/CONTEXT.md - Canonical layer pointer surface.
- ops/bin/compile - Deterministic compiler from templates to manifests.

## 2. Synthesis Engine
- ops/lib/scripts/synthesize.sh - Unified parser, hazard enforcement, and emitter.
- ops/bin/context - Session wrapper over synthesize.sh (OPS default + OPEN state).
- ops/bin/llms - Static bundle wrapper over synthesize.sh (CORE and DISCOVERY).

## 3. Core Pointers
- PoT.md
- SoP.md
- PoW.md
- TASK.md
- docs/MAP.md
